_comment: Realistic Amazon employee travel/expense questions for the reranker bakeoff. Authored to cover the corpus topic space in NATURAL phrasing, deliberately NOT copied from any single gold doc (lexical copying is what saturated the prior labeled eval). Real BM25 pools are retrieved from the live faq_evidence_a index; no gold labels are baked in here. Several queries intentionally have near-duplicate regional/global-access variants in the corpus, creating fine-grained ranking ambiguity that discriminates strong rerankers from weak ones.
queries: how do I book a flight and hotel for a business trip
can I fly business class and how much will the company pay back
what happens if my booking comes up as out of policy
where do I find a trip I booked a few weeks ago
what size rental car am I allowed to rent for work
I need to move my flight to a different day, how do I change it
what kinds of flights am I actually allowed to book
how do I pick or change my seat on a flight
I have a medical condition, how do I request a travel accommodation
how do I set up my travel profile for the first time
do I get to keep my frequent flyer miles when I travel for work
I got into a car accident in a rental during a work trip, what now
do I need a visa to travel internationally for business
can I pay extra myself to upgrade on a really long flight
is it ok to add a few personal vacation days onto a work trip
do I need my manager to approve my travel before I book
do I need to buy insurance for a rental car on a business trip
does the company provide travel insurance when I fly
the booking tool is broken, who do I contact for tech help
how do I reach a travel counselor or agent
can I book a personal vacation through the work travel tool
what hotels am I allowed to book and what is the nightly limit
why is the Amazon payment option not showing when I book a flight
I got a hotel confirmation email I never asked for, why
I was charged for a hotel even though I cancelled it
how do I cancel or change a hotel reservation
which expenses can I actually get reimbursed for
what is the deadline to submit my expenses after a trip
how do I file an expense report
my expense report got rejected, what do I do now
I can't figure out which expense category to use
are meals paid for while I'm traveling for business
can I expense my cell phone bill
how long until I actually get my reimbursement money
I lost the receipt for something, can I still expense it
I accidentally paid for a personal thing on my corporate card
who do I talk to if I need help with an expense report
can I upgrade my fare using points or miles instead of paying
why do I have to book through the official travel program at all
where is the contact info for travel support in my region
what do I do if my flight gets cancelled by the airline
are baggage fees and seat selection reimbursable when I travel
